file.string: Do you want to store it somewhere else also?
Click to add %1$s to this month
Do you want to import %1$d items, existing will be overwritten
No backups in NetWorthTracker folder, if you have backup file, open it with this application
Every row has current value, value change and percent compared to last month
Chart shows you from the first month filled until current month
Comments about the month go here
Current version is very minimal, improvements and new features are already in development
Start by adding your assets and liabilities monthly bases
Liabilities are added with minus, everything else in the view is same as assets
Month overview shows you all the filled months without asset details
